title: Compressed State Schema V1
description: JSON Schema for the compressed learner state used by the ZPD monitor and state estimators in Project Lumina.

mastery.description: Per-skill mastery estimates. Keys are skill IDs defined in the domain pack. Values are 0..1.

min_challenge.description: Lower bound of the ZPD band. Challenge below this is too easy.

max_challenge.description: Upper bound of the ZPD band. Challenge above this is too hard.

window_turns.description: Size of the rolling window in turns.

attempts.description: Number of task attempts in the current window.

hint_count.description: Number of hints used in the current window.

outside_pct.description: Fraction of turns in the window where challenge was outside the ZPD band.

consecutive_outside.description: Number of consecutive turns where challenge was outside the ZPD band.

outside_flags.description: Per-turn outside-ZPD flags for the rolling window. Most recent first.

challenge.description: Estimated challenge level of the current task (0..1). Compared to zpd_band to detect drift.

uncertainty.description: Orchestrator's uncertainty about the learner's current state (0..1). High uncertainty may warrant a probe.

session_turn.description: Current turn number within the session.

updated_utc.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last state update.
